name: Bug report
about: A prompt/template produced wrong or inconsistent output, or something broke
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

**⚠ Remove all personal data before posting** (names, real companies, your resume content).

**Which part?**
- [ ] A phase prompt (which? `prompts/0_-…`)
- [ ] A template (which?)
- [ ] A dashboard (linkedin-analysis / start-here)
- [ ] `.gitignore` / privacy
- [ ] Docs / setup

**What you did**
The command/prompt you ran (e.g., "Run Ascend Phase 4").

**What you expected**

**What happened**
Paste the relevant output with personal details redacted.

- OS: (macOS / Linux / Windows+WSL / Windows+GitBash)
